event: The Son of a Saint M'rabeth
description: A vibrant, sun-drenched painting depicting a young figure in white robes and a white head covering, elevated above a dense crowd of North African people. The central figure, identified as the son of a marabout (Islamic holy man), is carried or supported by an older bearded man wearing a white turban. The surrounding crowd presses in closely, with faces expressing reverence, joy, and devotion — hands raised in supplication and greeting. The figures wear traditional North African and Middle Eastern clothing in white, cream, and earth tones, with occasional touches of red.

_meta.title: The Son of a Saint M'rabeth
